positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic, cosmic mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should have smooth, geometric silhouettes, blending into swirling nebula clouds in shades of deep indigo, vibrant teal, and glowing gold. Integrate subtle celestial elements like crescent moons and distant constellations forming patterns on the peaks. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, visually balanced emblem. Style should be a blend of vaporwave aesthetic and highly polished vector art, maximizing clean lines and high contrast against a gradient background. Focus on strong, readable shapes suitable for direct printing on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, grain, logo, trademark, copyright, celebrity, character, writing
